code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut product = 1
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has_digit = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if has_digit
        product = product * (sign * current)
        current = 0
        sign = 1
        has_digit = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has_digit
      sign = 0 - 1
    else if b == 43 and not has_digit
      sign = 1
    else
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if has_digit
    product = product * (sign * current)
  end

  println("product=#{product}")
end
